features.title: Agent file deduplication
features.description: Convert 6 agent files from prose-heavy duplications into thin YAML-frontmatter wrappers pointing to role files as single source of truth.
steps: Verify role files contain canonical content
evidence: Sprint 1: 6 agent files -> thin wrappers (435 -> 118 lines, -317)

features.title: Command file shared pre-flight extraction
features.description: Extract shared State Validation block into SKILL.md. Command files reference it.
steps: Verify SKILL.md has Command Pre-Flight Validation section
Verify each command file references it
evidence: Sprint 1: Shared pre-flight in SKILL.md. All 5 commands reference it (305 -> 273 lines, -32)

features.title: SKILL.md non-core section extraction
features.description: Move non-core sections to references/advanced.md with one-line pointers in SKILL.md.
steps: Verify advanced.md exists with extracted sections
Verify full sections removed from SKILL.md
evidence: Sprint 2: advanced.md created with 7 sections. SKILL.md 787 -> 727 (-60 lines)

features.title: Codex detection simplification
features.description: Condense Codex detection to decision tree. Move detailed procedure to advanced.md.
steps: Verify decision tree in evaluator role file
evidence: Sprint 2: Codex pre-flight condensed to ~10-line decision tree. All 5 output fields preserved.

features.title: Conditional evaluator calibration
steps: Verify short runs skip calibration file
Verify scoring still works without file
evidence: Sprint 3: Calibration conditional on expected_sprint_count > 3. Coordinator, evaluator, and SKILL.md all updated.

features.title: Merge retrospective into progress log
features.description: Append retros to progress.md instead of separate retro-RX-RY.md files.
steps: Verify retro template removed from patterns.md
Verify progress.md template has retro section
evidence: Sprint 3: Retro template removed from patterns.md (-22 lines). Retro section added to progress.md template. Coordinator appends inline.
